channel.title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
channel.description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

item.title: Pressure Index 57/100 (elevated)
item.description: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 57/100 (elevated). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 3.9%.

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Key points from Wes Streeting speech as he launches leadership bid with pledge to rejoin EU
item.description: Key points from Wes Streeting speech as he launches leadership bid with pledge to rejoin EU

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Politics latest: Streeting launches Labour leadership bid with call to rejoin EU
item.description: Politics latest: Streeting launches Labour leadership bid with call to rejoin EU

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Wes Streeting confirms he will stand if Labour leadership race is triggered
item.description: Wes Streeting confirms he will stand if Labour leadership race is triggered

item.title: i Politics: Starmer could stand aside for Burnham - but here’s why it's not that simple
item.description: Starmer could stand aside for Burnham - but here’s why it's not that simple

item.title: Bluesky · @georgeeaton.bsky.social: Wes Streeting correct on Labour not having had a battle of ideas for more than a decade – and why that has to change.
item.description: Wes Streeting correct on Labour not having had a battle of ideas for more than a decade – and why that has to change.

item.title: Independent UK Politics: ‘Starmer is doing nothing, but Burnham is for the people’: Makerfield voters pin their hopes on the ‘King of the North’
item.description: ‘Starmer is doing nothing, but Burnham is for the people’: Makerfield voters pin their hopes on the ‘King of the North’

item.title: LabourList: Wes Streeting confirms he will stand for Labour leader in future contest
item.description: Wes Streeting confirms he will stand for Labour leader in future contest

item.title: The Guardian: Streeting launches scathing attack on Starmer - and calls for UK to rejoin EU - The Guardian
item.description: Streeting launches scathing attack on Starmer - and calls for UK to rejoin EU - The Guardian

item.title:
Bluesky · @georgeeaton.bsky.social: Wes Streeting calls for the UK to rejoin the EU in his speech to the Progress conference.
“We need a new special relationship with the EU, because Britain’s future lies with Europe - and one day back in the European ...
item.description:
Wes Streeting calls for the UK to rejoin the EU in his speech to the Progress conference.
“We need a new special relationship with the EU, because Britain’s future lies with Europe - and one day back in the European ...

item.title:
Bluesky · @stephenkb.bsky.social: Streeting continues:
“As a result, we arrived in government underprepared in too many areas and lacking clarity of vision and direction. Questions which had gone unanswered in opposition couldn't be ignored in office...
item.description:
Streeting continues:
“As a result, we arrived in government underprepared in too many areas and lacking clarity of vision and direction. Questions which had gone unanswered in opposition couldn't be ignored in office...
